If $N \% 2 === 0$ (N is even), return $\min(C_1, C_2)$.

If $N=3$ (odd): $C_1$ calculated. Returns $C_1$. Correct.
If $N=4$ (even): $C_1, C_2$ calculated. Returns $\min(C_1, C_2)$. Correct.
If $N=5$ (odd): $C_1$ calculated. Returns $C_1$. Correct.
If $N=6$ (even): $C_1, C_2$ calculated. Returns $\min(C_1, C_2)$. Correct.

This approach is robust. I will use the `calculate_cost` helper function as defined previously.
